description: REST API for the Maverick Intelligence B2B website-visitor identification platform. Provides programmatic, read-only access to identified people and companies, their behavioral events (page views, clicks, scrolls), and account-level analytics. API-key auth via the X-API-Key header, cursor-based pagination, and a 1,000 requests/hour rate limit.
rules: Base URL is https://api-v1.maverickintelligence.co and all endpoints are prefixed with /v1/.
Authenticate every request (except GET /v1/health) with an API key in the X-API-Key header.
List endpoints use cursor-based pagination: pass the response's pagination.nextCursor back as the cursor query parameter.
The rate limit is 1,000 requests per hour per account, shared across all API keys; handle 429 responses using the Retry-After header.
The API is read-only (GET only) and results are always sorted by lastSeen descending.
